campaign_repository.go no longer exposes tenant_id IS NULL GetBySlug/ListEnabled methods.

020_tenant_notification_nullable_cleanup.sql drops notification legacy idempotency compatibility and sets notifications.tenant_id NOT NULL.

Added forward migrations and regression tests for the new behavior.
operator_message: TMP-074 residual tenant-null cleanup is complete and verified.
